meta.target: the Wi-Fi blue circular toggle button
meta.goal: turn off wifi now trying to click on: the Wi-Fi blue circular toggle button

description: The screen displays a macOS Control Center panel. On the left side, there are connectivity options including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and AirDrop. On the right side, there are controls for Do Not Disturb, Keyboard Brightness, and AirPlay Display, along with brightness and volume sliders, and a music player widget at the bottom.

controls.label: Wi-Fi toggle button
controls.reason: The goal is to turn off Wi-Fi. This blue circular button is the toggle for the Wi-Fi connection, and clicking its center is the most direct way to interact with it.
